☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ Angel had learned the hard way that if you get your hopes up too high, you’re headed straight for disappointment and, considering they were in Hell, disaster. Hope of any kind was a luxury down here and it seemed like Charlie, the naive idiot she was, was hoarding most of it. But, fuck, sometimes after so long of just going through the motions and putting on a mask day in and day out a person needs something, anything, to hold onto. Even if it’s false hope - a rotten fruit that will only poison them.

Thats why, when Angel heard some dumbass in an alley muttering about a Sinner who could sever soul deals, he damn near choked on air. It was.. impossible. Completely and utterly impossible, let alone improbable. How would that even work? He didn’t have the slightest clue, but.. seeing as only desperate people get trapped in Soul Deals the price for being cut out of one must be a lot. Not even just to do it, but for the Sinner who can supposedly do it to bother. Everything comes with a price, and Angel had learned that the hard way. ❞
